name: Zhipu AI Coding Plan

dataUsage.retentionPolicy: The privacy policy says personal information is deleted or anonymized after the user requests deletion, except where laws require retention; backup copies may persist until they can be cleared or anonymized. No API/customer-content-specific retention schedule was found in the public docs reviewed.
dataUsage.details: The public privacy policy is a general platform policy for Beijing Zhipu Huazhang Technology Co., Ltd. and does not clearly state whether API/Coding Plan customer prompts, code, files, or outputs are used for model training.

notes: Primary-source documentation confirms Zhipu AI Coding Plan is operated by Beijing Zhipu Huazhang Technology Co., Ltd. in China and uses a dedicated Coding Plan API endpoint, but the reviewed public docs do not disclose a DPA/AVV, sub-processor list, SCCs, EU-only processing option, or customer-data-training posture. Because no EU processing commitment was found and the provider is China-headquartered, EU-only inference should be treated as unavailable and data may leave the EU.
